# FoodTracks — AI-Powered Inventory Management for Food Trucks & Restaurants

> FoodTracks is a SaaS platform that helps food truck owners and restaurant operators manage inventory, predict sales using AI, track margins, and reduce food waste. Available at https://foodtracks.io

## What is FoodTracks?

FoodTracks is an intelligent inventory management software designed specifically for food trucks and small restaurants. It combines real-time stock tracking, AI-powered sales predictions based on location and weather data, invoice scanning, and SumUp payment integration to give operators full visibility into their business performance.

## Key Features

- **AI Sales Predictions**: Forecasts daily sales based on historical data, location, weather, and event type. Accuracy rate: 92%.
- **Real-Time Stock Tracking**: Monitor inventory levels in real-time with automatic alerts for low stock and expiring products.
- **Invoice Scanning**: Scan supplier invoices with your phone camera to automatically update inventory and track costs.
- **SumUp Integration**: Connect your SumUp terminal to automatically sync all sales transactions and match them with inventory.
- **Margin Analytics**: Real-time profit margin calculations per product, per location, per time period.
- **Multi-Location Support**: Manage inventory across multiple food trucks or restaurant locations from one dashboard.
- **Food Waste Reduction**: Track and reduce waste with expiration alerts and demand-based ordering suggestions.

## Pricing

- **Free Plan**: €0/month — 1 location, 50 products, basic analytics
- **Pro Plan**: €29/month — Unlimited locations, AI predictions, advanced analytics, SumUp integration, priority support
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — API access, dedicated support, custom integrations

## Target Audience

- Food truck owners and operators
- Small restaurant owners
- Street food vendors
- Catering businesses
- Mobile food businesses

## Company Information

- **Website**: https://foodtracks.io
- **Contact**: contact@foodtracks.io
- **Languages**: French (primary), English
- **Headquarters**: France
- **Founded**: 2025

## Technical Stack

- Built with Next.js (React)
- Cloud-hosted on European servers (GDPR compliant)
- Real-time data synchronization
- Mobile-responsive web application

## Blog & Resources

FoodTracks publishes guides and articles for food truck operators at https://foodtracks.io/fr/blog covering topics such as:
- Inventory management best practices
- Food truck regulations in France
- Finding the best locations
- Reducing food waste
- Connecting payment terminals
- Improving profitability

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How does FoodTracks predict sales?**
A: FoodTracks uses machine learning algorithms that analyze historical sales data, location foot traffic patterns, weather forecasts, and event calendars to predict daily demand for each product with 92% accuracy.

**Q: Does FoodTracks work with SumUp?**
A: Yes, FoodTracks integrates directly with SumUp. Once connected, all card transactions are automatically synced and matched with your inventory, giving you real-time revenue and margin visibility.

**Q: How much does FoodTracks cost?**
A: FoodTracks offers a free plan with basic features (1 location, 50 products). The Pro plan costs €29/month and includes AI predictions, unlimited locations, and SumUp integration. No credit card required to start.

**Q: Is FoodTracks GDPR compliant?**
A: Yes, FoodTracks is fully GDPR compliant. All data is stored on European servers, and users have full control over their data.

**Q: Can I scan my supplier invoices?**
A: Yes, FoodTracks includes an invoice scanning feature. Simply take a photo of your supplier invoice, and the app automatically extracts product names, quantities, and prices to update your inventory.
